title: Illuminated initial panel — gilded versal with border
sources: Edward Johnston, Writing and Illuminating and Lettering (1906) — chapter on illumination and gilding; chapters on gesso grounds
notes: Complete illuminated panel tutorial: sketch the initial design, trace to good paper, lay gesso ground and allow to cure (multi-day), burnish and gild, apply gouache colour, outline in ink. Teaches the traditional order-of-work: gesso first, gold second, pigment third. Includes the sandarac surface-preparation and the raised-gesso breathing-and-pressing technique for gold adhesion.
